slice: Signed Open Badges 3.0 VC-JWT issuance, verification and revocation
status: implementation evidence; not production-ready and not a 1EdTech certification claim
negativeCoverage: forged and tampered Compact JWS rejected
cross-learner issuance and revocation denied uniformly
Space key rotation denied without assignments.manage
private issuer material never returned by the public key endpoint
retired public keys remain available for historical verification
unknown status identifiers do not enumerate credentials
source credential revocation blocks verification immediately
effective account erasure revokes active signed credentials
signed credential and lifecycle rows are immutable
boundary: Phase 3 remains PILOT/CLOSURE IN PROGRESS. Its Blacksteel pilot, independent penetration test, full-journey WCAG 2.2 AA assessment, production evidence, restore exercise and stakeholder acceptance remain mandatory before Phase 4 can be called production-ready.
